opening_complaint.verbatim_patient_text: The machine at the pharmacy said my blood pressure was dangerously high, and now I'm terrified I'm about to have a stroke.
opening_complaint.stated_reason_for_presenting_today: Had a very high blood pressure reading at a pharmacy machine earlier today and has been extremely anxious and distressed at home ever since, frightened of having a stroke.

symptom_narrative.onset: started this morning after a routine health check at a pharmacy showed a very high blood pressure reading
symptom_narrative.duration: anxious and distressed for the past several hours since the reading
symptom_narrative.character: no physical symptoms at all - just an intense feeling of fear and dread about the number
symptom_narrative.severity_patient_description: extremely anxious and frightened, pacing the house, though physically feels completely well
symptom_narrative.timing_pattern: the fear spiked right after seeing the pharmacy reading
symptom_narrative.what_makes_it_better: sitting quietly at home and being reassured makes the anxiety ease a little
symptom_narrative.what_makes_it_worse: thinking about the high number and being around medical equipment or clinics
symptom_narrative.associated_symptoms_volunteered: no headache, no visual changes, no chest pain, no shortness of breath - completely well apart from the anxiety
symptom_narrative.previous_episodes: says she often gets very nervous and her readings shoot up whenever she is around doctors, nurses or medical machines
symptom_narrative.functional_impact: independent and functioning normally, but pacing the house in an acute state of anxiety

social_history_volunteered.relevant_life_context: describes long-standing heightened anxiety and nervousness specifically around healthcare professionals and medical equipment

psychosocial_profile.hidden_agenda: genuinely terrified of an imminent stroke; wants strong reassurance and definitive proof she is not in danger

communication_style.typical_message_style: anxious, repeatedly references the high pharmacy number and fear of a stroke

objective_data_offered.timing: earlier today at a pharmacy machine
objective_data_offered.reliability_caveat: single reading on a public pharmacy machine taken during acute anxiety; likely to over-read and not a validated resting measurement

objective_data_offered.value: around 125/80 mmHg after sitting quietly for about 15 minutes
objective_data_offered.timing: later today at home after resting
objective_data_offered.reliability_caveat: self-reported reading in a calm home setting; not on a validated/calibrated cuff, but notably lower once the anxiety trigger was removed
